title: Gaddiy'el #1427
definition:
Gaddiel = "God is my fortune"

 1) the spy from the tribe of Zebulun sent by Moses to spy out the
    land of Canaan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gaddiel = "God is my fortune"

 1) the spy from the tribe of Zebulun sent by Moses to spy out the
    land of Canaan

    NASB:  El is my fortune, an Isr.
